rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE HOPE TRUST DATED OCTOBER 2 1990 AS AMENDED
rulings.Calendar Matter: Demurrer To Petition For Accounting Etc., And Motion To Dismiss
rulings.Rulings: Tentative rulings to demurrer as follows: 1st cause of action; duty to report and account; sustain with 10 days leave to amend 2nd cause of action; duty of loyalty; sustain with 10 days leave to amend 3rd cause of action; duty to make trust property productive; sustain with 10 days leave to amended 4th cause of action; duty to administer trust with reasonable care; overrule 5th cause of action; surhcarge of Podesta; overrule 6th cause of action; attorneys' fees; overrule 7th cause of action; request for order that Podesta cannot use trust funds of Flynn Industrities or Flynn Ventures for his legal representation in this matter; overrule 8th cause of action; removal of Elliott Steinberg as GAL for all purposes; overrule Tentative ruling on Motion to Dismiss; Deny

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE HOPE TRUST DATED OCTOBER 2 1990 AS AMENDED
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Special Motion To Strike Petition For Accounting, Etc., Under The Anti-Slapp Statute
rulings.Rulings: Anti-SLAPP motion to strike filed by Podesta as to Mali's petition for accounting Tentative ruling: Deny

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE TRUST AGREEMENT ESTABLISHING THE DAF TRUST DATED MARCH 31, 2003
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Dismiss Petition For Removal For All Purposes Of Elliot Steinberg As Guardian Ad Litem
rulings.Rulings: Tenative ruling; Off calendar, Mali's underlying accounting petition went off calendar per moving party on 8/19/09

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE IRREVOCABLE TRUST AGREEMENT ESTABLISHING THE DONALD ALEXANDER FLYNN TRUST DATED JANUARY 1, 2001
rulings.Calendar Matter: Demurrer And Motion To Dismiss To Petition For Accounting Etc.
rulings.Rulings: Tentative rulings as to the demurrer as follows: 1st cause of action; accounting and report of trust administration; Sustain with 10 days leave to amend as to standing and failure to state cause of action 2nd cause of action; breach of duty of loyalty; Sustain with 10 days leave to amend as to standing and failure to state cause of action 3rd cause of action; breach of duty to make trust property productive; Sustain with 10 days leave to amend as to standing and failure to state cause of action 4th cause of action; duty to administer trust with reasonable care; Sustain with 10 days leave to amend as to standing and failure to state cause of action 5th cause of action; appointment of trustee to fill vacancy based on refusal to act; Sustain without leave to amend based on standing 6th cause of action; removal of trustee and appointment of successor trustee; Sustain with 10 days leave to amend as to standing and failure to state cause of action 7th cause of action; surcharge of the co-trustees; Overrule as to standing and failure to state cause of action 8th cause of action; declaratory relief that Alex is owner of 10% of Flynn Ventures; Sustain without leave to amend based on standing 9th cause of action; modification of trust; Sustain without leave to amend based on standing 10th cause of action; for co-trustees to pay petitioner's legal fees; Overrule 11th cause of action; for order denying co-trustees' attorneys' fees from being paid from the trust or from Flynn Industries; Overrule 12th cause of action; removal of Steinberg as GAL for all purposes; Overrule Tentative ruling on motion to dismiss; Deny

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE IRREVOCABLE TRUST AGREEMENT ESTABLISHING THE DONALD ALEXANDER FLYNN TRUST DATED JANUARY 1, 2001
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Demurrer To, Or In The Alternative Motion To Dismiss Petition For Appointment Of Guardian Ad Litem Probate
rulings.Rulings: Demurrer to/alterntatively motion to dismiss petition for appointment of GAL and request for Judicial Notice filed by Steinberg as to Mali's petition for GAL Tentative ruling on demurrer; Overrule with 10 days leave to respond Tentative ruling on motion to dismiss; Deny Tentative ruling on request for judicial notice; Grant as to the fact of the filings of the documents for which judicial notice is requested but denied as to the truth of any of their contents

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE IRREVOCABLE TRUST AGREEMENT ESTABLISHING THE DONALD ALEXANDER FLYNN TRUST DATED JANUARY 1, 2001
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Dismiss Petition For Removal For All Purposes Of Elliot Steinberg As Guardian Ad Litem
rulings.Rulings: Motion to dismiss petition for removal for all purposes of Steinberg as to Mali's accounting and petition and request for Judicial Notice Tentative ruling on motion to dismiss; Deny Tentative ruling on request for Judicial Notice; Grant as to the fact of the filings of the documents for which judicial notice is requested but deny as to the truth of any of their contents

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF EMMANUEL RALPH EVANS
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel.
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, January 7, 2010, line 1, PETITIONER SHARLISA BYRD Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel. Off Calendar, per moving party. =(302/CWW)
